LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ARIANE DOBRIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 1281.6 AND PROVIDE A LIST OF POTENTIAL ARBITRATORS TO THE COURT BY JUNE 1, 2009. MOTION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 10, 2009. ALSO, THE COURT ADDS, COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING POSSIBLE ARBITRATORS. (302/CWW)JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5759

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator; Nomination Of Judicial Arbitration And Mediation Services (Jams); Supporting Memorandum Of P/A; Declaration Of Hal Chase, Jr.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ARIANE DOBRIN'S Motion to Compel Arbitration and for Appointment of Neutral Arbitrator; Nomination of Judicial Arbitration And Mediation Services (Jams). Appearances: Deanne J. Broglio, of Philip M. Andersen & Assoc. (415) 267-3600. Ms. Broglio informs the Court that counsel have chosen Tad Shaprio as the arbitrator. The Court amended its tentative ruling as follows: The Court designates Tad Shapiro as arbitrator. (Moving party to prepare Order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator; Nomination Of Judicial Arbitration And Mediation Services (Jams); Supporting Memorandum Of P/A; Declaration Of Hal Chase, Jr.
Off Calendar May-08-2009 Continued To Jun-10-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ARIANE DOBRIN'S Motion to Compel Arbitration and for Appointment of Neutral Arbitrator. Appearances: Hal Chase Jr. of Law Offices of Jon-Marc Dobrin, (415) 459-0307 appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Paul Silver, Esq. of Philip Andersen and Associates, (415) 267-3600, appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Parties to comply with CCP section 1281.6 and provide a list of potential arbitrators to the Court by June 1, 2009. Motion is continued to June 10, 2009. Also, the Court adds, counsel to meet and confer regarding possible arbitrators. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
